Class ArrayDeclaration

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.JavaDeclaration
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.TypeDeclaration
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.ArrayDeclaration
All Implemented Interfaces:
ArrayType, ClassType, ClassTypeContainer, Member, ProgramModelElement, Type, Declaration, MemberDeclaration, TypeDeclarationContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, ScopeDefiningElement, SourceElement, TypeScope, VariableScope, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
public class ArrayDeclaration extends TypeDeclaration implements ArrayType
KeY used to model arrays using only the ArrayType. As the only attribute of an array has been the length attribute, it has been handled in a different way than members of usual classes. As we need some implicit fields for array creation and initialisation, the special handling of arrays is not any longer practicable. So, this class introduce a 'virtual' declaration for array types containing all required members. Please not the array fields accessed by an index are not included, so arrays of different lengths with same base type belong to the same array declaration. Attention: In contrast to the other type declaration, array declarations may be added at runtime.
